case_title: SHIRLEY JARLAK VS. SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BY COURT. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY PORTUGESE INTERPRETER---RODRIGO DE SALVO BRAZ. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MEIR SCHNEIDER--INSTRUCTOR AND FOUNDER OF SELF HEALING RESEARCH CENTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,062.50 FILED BY SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JARLAK, SHIRLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BY COURT. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY PORTUGESE INTERPRETER---RODRIGO DE SALVO BRAZ. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MEIR SCHNEIDER--INSTRUCTOR AND FOUNDER OF SELF HEALING RESEARCH CENTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,660.00 FILED BY JARLAK, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEES $65.00 SERVED APR-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JARLAK, SHIRLEY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JARLAK, SHIRLEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JARLAK, SHIRLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SELF-HEALING RESEARCH FOUNDATION DBA SCHOOL FOR SELF HEALING RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JARLAK, SHIRLEY $1,536.25 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,651.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
